score_caps_active.reason: No frente has been evaluated yet

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: M4 != production-ready
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: M4_Tested means tests pass, NOT route-hardening, NOT UI maturity, NOT M5_Hardened. 0/14 modules are M5.

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: anonymous = BLOCKER preventivo
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: user_id=anonymous is INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE, not a user. Blocks R1, memory tests, multiuser. Requires T1 classification.

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: SMP = Sovereign Memory Plane
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: NOT Secure Memory Protocol. Cryptographic foundation. Cronos cannot be implemented without SMP resolved.

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: Portfolio UI does not exist
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: No consolidated portfolio view exists inside the Monstruo. Child projects have independent UIs.

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: Command Center != control plane
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: CC is a partial visualization console (7 surfaces), not a control plane with write authority. Cockpit canonical has 12-15 surfaces.

confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.title: PRE-IA hypotheses are DRAFT
confirmed_truths_v1_2_additions.summary: Only T1 can close PRE-IA phase. Hypotheses pre-IA-001..010 cannot be canonized without explicit T1 closure.

do_not_repeat.title: No proponer Cronista Familiar
do_not_repeat.summary: Es alias descartado de cronos_modo_cripta. Consultar ALIAS_LEDGER antes de proponer conceptos.

do_not_repeat.title: No llamar runtime a APP_VISION
do_not_repeat.summary: APP_VISION es doctrina, no codigo. Que algo este en APP_VISION no significa que este implementado.

do_not_repeat.title: No cerrar PRE-IA
do_not_repeat.summary: Solo T1 con frase literal explicita puede cerrar la fase PRE-IA.

do_not_repeat.title: No llamar control plane a CC
do_not_repeat.summary: Command Center actual es consola parcial read-only, no control plane con write authority.
